SEARCH
Package fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.resource

Class DishResource

java.lang.Object
fr.javaeat.javaeatdishesusers.resource.DishResource
@Path("/dishes") @Produces("application/json") @Consumes("application/json") public class DishResource extends Object
Exposes REST endpoints for dish operations in the Resource layer. This resource handles HTTP requests and delegates business processing to the DishService.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DishResource()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    addDish(Dish dish)
    Handles HTTP POST requests to create a new dish.
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    deleteDish(int id)
    Handles HTTP DELETE requests to remove a dish.
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    getDish(int id)
    Handles HTTP GET requests to retrieve one dish by identifier.
    List<Dish>
    getDishes()
    Handles HTTP GET requests to retrieve all dishes.
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    updateDish(int id, Dish dish)
    Handles HTTP PUT requests to update an existing dish.

  • Constructor Details

    • DishResource

      public DishResource()

  • Method Details

    • getDishes

      @GET public List<Dish> getDishes()
      Handles HTTP GET requests to retrieve all dishes.
      Returns:
      list of available dishes as JSON payload

    • getDish

      @GET @Path("/{id}") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response getDish(@PathParam("id") int id)
      Handles HTTP GET requests to retrieve one dish by identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - dish identifier extracted from the request path
      Returns:
      HTTP 200 with the dish when found, otherwise HTTP 404

    • addDish

      @POST public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response addDish(Dish dish)
      Handles HTTP POST requests to create a new dish.
      Parameters:
      dish - request body containing dish data
      Returns:
      HTTP 201 when creation succeeds, otherwise HTTP 400

    • updateDish

      @PUT @Path("/{id}") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response updateDish(@PathParam("id") int id, Dish dish)
      Handles HTTP PUT requests to update an existing dish.
      Parameters:
      id - dish identifier extracted from the request path
      dish - request body containing updated dish data
      Returns:
      HTTP 200 when update succeeds, otherwise HTTP 404

    • deleteDish

      @DELETE @Path("/{id}") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response deleteDish(@PathParam("id") int id)
      Handles HTTP DELETE requests to remove a dish.
      Parameters:
      id - dish identifier extracted from the request path
      Returns:
      HTTP 204 when deletion succeeds, otherwise HTTP 404
